title: Sheri Thomas
compiled_truth: Sheri Thomas is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-03-29), Sheri Thomas sent 82 and received 1068 emails, totalling 1150 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sally Beck](people/sally-beck) (57), [Jennifer Denny](people/jennifer-denny) (15), [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (10), [Andy Zipper](people/andy-zipper) (8), [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (8).
